name: python-env-switcher
description: Automatically switch to the relevant python virtual environment depending on the active file. Supports the Python Environment extension.

pythonEnvSwitcher.venvName.description: Name of the virtual-environment directory to look for when walking up from the active file.

pythonEnvSwitcher.scope.markdownDescription: Scope passed to `setEnvironment`. **`workspaceFolder`** sets the env for the whole workspace folder — the only scope Pylance's single per-folder analysis service reads, so it is what actually moves Pylance (it flips the whole folder's analysis to the active file's venv). `project` sets it on the file's containing Python project (which Pylance ignores for sub-projects in a single-folder window). `file` sets it per file.

pythonEnvSwitcher.showNotifications.description: Show an information message each time the environment is switched.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
